description: You are a Clinical Research Associate (CRA) conducting a monitoring visit for the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). Using the OpenClinica system (login: root / Admin123!), manage discrepancy notes for three subjects within the Phase II Diabetes Trial study. Create a new 'Query' type discrepancy note for subject DM-101 on the enrollment date or a subject-level field with the description 'Enrollment date does not match source document. Please verify and correct.' in 'New' status. Add an 'Annotation' type discrepancy note for subject DM-102 with the description 'Informed consent version 3.1 verified during monitoring visit.' For subject DM-103, locate the existing discrepancy note regarding the unusually high blood pressure value and update its status to 'Closed' with the closing comment 'Verified against source. Value confirmed correct.'

metadata.dm101_query_text: Enrollment date does not match source document
